title: Subagents, Parallelism, and Coordination · Guided Harness Build
summary: Coordinate specialist agents without duplicate or conflicting work. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a bounded multi-agent execution map while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Delegate only concrete independent work with a clear return contract.
Give a subagent the minimum context required without losing governing constraints.
Coordinate shared files, locks, messages, and ownership boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
